profile.name: Yashvi Poojari
profile.tagline: I build ML pipelines, ship AI-powered apps, and turn messy data into decisions that actually matter.
profile.bio: I'm a Computer Science & Business Systems undergraduate at RAIT building end-to-end ML pipelines, AI-powered web apps, and 3D interactive experiences. I care about models that generalise, code that's readable, and products that solve real problems — not just hit a benchmark. SIH'24 National Finalist out of 1,000+ participants. AWS Cloud Foundations certified. Three IBM Data Science credentials. Currently seeking internship opportunities in Machine Learning, AI, Software Development, or Data Analytics.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science & Business Systems — 8.81 CGPA

experience.summary: Led logistics for a 500-attendee college cultural event and published original writing on the chapter's official platform.
highlights: Led the Open Mic Cultural Event 2024 end-to-end — managed public relations, logistics, and sponsorship coordination with Faber-Castell for 70+ performers and ~500 live attendees.
Published 2 original articles on The Wall RAIT's official Instagram page, contributing to the college-wide creative writing community.
Volunteered at The Open Mic 2023, supporting event operations and audience management.

experience.summary: Designated technical writer for the International Society of Automation student chapter, documenting workshops, conferences, and organizational events.
highlights: Authored 10+ technical reports on IoT, 3D printing, and industry-focused workshops, capturing outcomes and insights for chapter records.
Prepared formal documentation including Minutes of Meetings, permission letters, and official invitations for ISA-organized events.
Participated in ISA technical conferences covering automation, IoT, and emerging engineering technologies.

services.title: Machine Learning
services.subtitle: Classification · Regression · Pipelines
services.description: End-to-end ML pipelines from raw data to deployed model. Feature engineering, model selection, cross-validation, and performance tuning — with a focus on metrics that matter for the problem, not just accuracy.

services.title: AI-Powered Apps
services.subtitle: LLM Integration · NLP · Deployment
services.description: Building practical AI applications that work beyond the demo. From CV rankers to document extraction pipelines — I connect models to real interfaces and ship things people can actually use.

services.title: Data Analysis & Viz
services.subtitle: EDA · Dashboards · Insights
services.description: Turning raw datasets into clear, actionable insights. Exploratory data analysis, statistical visualisations, and interactive dashboards that communicate findings without requiring a statistics degree to read.

services.title: Web & Frontend Dev
services.subtitle: JavaScript · HTML/CSS · Deployment
services.description: Client-side web applications with real utility — from mood-based travel planners to ATS scoring tools. I build things that work without backends where possible, and deploy them so they're actually accessible.

projects.title: Ocean Cleaning Game
projects.subtitle: SIH'24 National Finalist · Unity 3D
projects.description: 3D Unity game advancing marine conservation awareness — built as a 6-member team in a 2-day sprint at Smart India Hackathon 2024. Delivered 5 custom Blender assets and gameplay mapped to 7+ UNESCO SDGs. Advanced to nationals out of 1,000+ teams on the same problem statement.

projects.title: Ka-Chow Store
projects.subtitle: E-commerce · Web App
projects.description: A fully functional e-commerce web application built from scratch. Browse products, manage a cart, and complete purchases — all in a clean, responsive interface.

projects.title: ATS CV Ranker
projects.subtitle: NLP · Resume Scoring
projects.description: CV scoring system that ranks uploaded resumes against a job description across 4 weighted categories: Technical Skills (40%), Tools (25%), Domain (20%), Soft Skills (10%). Parses PDF, DOCX, and TXT; returns ATS score and grade per candidate in real time. Tested on 10+ real CVs.

projects.title: Smart Travel Planner
projects.subtitle: JavaScript · Client-side App
projects.description: Mood-based travel planning app backed by a self-constructed database of 150+ cities across 5 continents with attractions and daily cost estimates. Generates day-by-day itineraries, supports PDF/TXT export, and runs entirely client-side with zero backend.
